meta.name: FFMQ-15 Five Facet Mindfulness Questionnaire
meta.description: The FFMQ-15 is a 15-item self-report measure of mindfulness assessing five facets: observing, describing, acting with awareness, non-judging, and non-reacting.
meta.author: Baer et al. (2006); 15-item: Gu et al. (2016)
meta.reference: Gu J, Strauss C, Crane C, et al. Examining the factor structure of the 39-item and 15-item versions of the Five Facet Mindfulness Questionnaire. Mindfulness. 2016;7(6):1441-1451.
meta.instruction: Please rate each of the following statements. Answer according to what really reflects your experience rather than what you think your experience should be.

questions.text: When I am walking, I deliberately notice the sensations of my body moving
I am good at finding words to describe my feelings
I do jobs or tasks automatically without being aware of what I am doing
I tell myself I should not be feeling the way I am feeling
When I have distressing thoughts or images, I am able to just notice them without reacting
I notice changes in smells and aromas
I can easily put my beliefs, opinions, and expectations into words
I do not pay attention to what I am doing because I am daydreaming, worrying, or otherwise distracted
I make judgments about whether my thoughts are good or bad
I watch my feelings without getting lost in them
I notice visual elements in art or nature, such as colors, shapes, textures, or patterns of light and shadow
Even when I am feeling terribly upset, I can find a way to put it into words
I find it difficult to stay focused on what is happening in the present
I believe some of my thoughts are abnormal or bad and I should not think that way
In difficult situations, I can pause without immediately reacting

ranges.label: Low Mindfulness
ranges.description: Your mindfulness level is low. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Try 5-10 minutes of mindfulness meditation daily
Consider a Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction program
Practice deliberate attention to everyday activities
Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others

ranges.label: Moderate Mindfulness
ranges.description: Your mindfulness is moderate with room for growth. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Review subscale scores for improvement areas
Continue regular mindfulness practice
Practice observing thoughts without judgment
Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

ranges.label: High Mindfulness
ranges.description: Your mindfulness level is high. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Continue your mindfulness practice
Explore advanced mindfulness techniques
Integrate mindfulness into more daily activities
Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging

observing.label: Low
observing.description: Low awareness of sensory experiences. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

observing.label: Moderate
observing.description: Sometimes notices sensory experiences. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

observing.label: High
observing.description: Skilled at noticing sensory experiences. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

describing.label: Low
describing.description: Difficulty putting inner experiences into words. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

describing.label: Moderate
describing.description: Able to describe inner experiences to some extent. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

describing.label: High
describing.description: Skilled at articulating feelings and thoughts. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

actaware.label: Low
actaware.description: Often on autopilot or distracted. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

actaware.label: Moderate
actaware.description: Sometimes able to focus on present activities. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

actaware.label: High

suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

nonjudge.label: Low
nonjudge.description: Frequently judges own thoughts negatively. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

nonjudge.label: Moderate
nonjudge.description: Sometimes accepts inner experiences without judgment. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

nonjudge.label: High
nonjudge.description: Approaches inner experiences with openness. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

nonreact.description: Easily carried away by inner experiences. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

nonreact.label: Moderate
nonreact.description: Sometimes maintains distance from inner experiences. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

nonreact.description: Observes inner experiences without being caught up. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional
